description: Peaceful vineyards by Lake Geneva in Switzerland, chosen for its relaxing countryside and scenic beauty away from the city.
Fouji Mountain in Japan, chosen for its breathtaking view and fascination with the iconic peak.
A beautifully lit traditional Chinese pagoda at night. I chose it because the architecture is striking and instantly evokes classic Chinese design.
The Aurora Borealis over a snowy coast, a magical sight that always warms my heart.
The mysterious stone statues of Easter Island, which have always made me wonder about their meaning and creation.
A peaceful lakeside landscape in Morschach, Switzerland, surrounded by mountains and greenery. I chose it because it is a place where I can relax and connect with nature.
The Al-Aqsa Mosque in Palestine my home, a historic and sacred site. I chose it because it is the place I most want to revisit.
A scenic mountainous trail in Domaniç, Türkiye, surrounded by colorful fall foliage. I chose it because I want to experience hiking in a place like this.
Korean street food trucks in Gwangju, Korea, bustling with local flavors. I chose it because I have always wanted to try Korean street food.
Historic landmarks in Rome, Italy, showcasing the city's rich architectural heritage. I chose it because I want to visit these sites and explore Italy's history.
